nasb.text: But she said to her, “Is it a small matter for you to take my husband? And would you take my son’s mandrakes also?” So Rachel said, “Therefore he may lie with you tonight in return for your son’s mandrakes.”

esv.text: But she said to her, “Is it a small matter that you have taken away my husband? Would you take away my son’s mandrakes also?” Rachel said, “Then he may lie with you tonight in exchange for your son’s mandrakes.”

cnv.text: 利亞回答拉結：“你奪去了我的丈夫，還算小事嗎？你還要奪去我兒子的風茄嗎？”拉結說：“好吧，今夜就讓他與你同睡，來交換你兒子的風茄。”

ccb.text: 利亚说：“你抢了我丈夫还不够吗？现在还要抢我儿子的风茄吗？”拉结回答说：“你给我风茄，今夜雅各就跟你同房。”

csbs.text: 莉亚对她说：“难道你夺取了我丈夫还不够，又要夺取我儿子的风茄吗？” 瑞秋说：“那好，为了换取你儿子的风茄，今夜他可以与你同睡。”
